mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE AGG_HOST_PARTITION_DETAIL_1H DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT TIME as time, PARTITION_NAME as partitionName, ROUND(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilization, ROUND(avgMerge(USED_AVG),2) as used FROM AGG_HOST_PARTITION_DETAIL_1H dpd WHERE dpd.HOST_ID = ${hostId} AND TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, PARTITION_NAME, TIME ORDER BY TIME ASC

SELECT PARTITION_NAME as partitionName,HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
ROUND(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilizationAvg , maxMerge(UTILIZATION_MAX) as utilizationMax, minMerge(UTILIZATION_MIN) as utilizationMin
ROUND(avgMerge(USED_AVG),2) as usedAvg , maxMerge(USED_MAX) as usedMax, minMerge(USED_MIN) as usedMin
FROM AGG_HOST_PARTITION_DETAIL_1H WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, PARTITION_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
ROUND(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilizationAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(USED_AVG),2) as usedAvg
FROM AGG_HOST_PARTITION_DETAIL_1H WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr
